case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. WENDELL FOSTER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-19-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-19-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-05-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DIANA PADILLA. (212)
